role: A fixed-position entry button that opens the tools palette by calling the store's openTools action.
capabilities: Trigger the tools palette via openTools on click
Provide an accessible aria-label and a decorative glyph
substance_why: It only renders the trigger button and delegates opening to the store; the palette itself, final placement, and copy are explicitly scaffold-grade or TODO.
interactions_missing: No keyboard shortcut or alternative activation
No open/closed state feedback or toggle behavior
No tool selection or active-tool indication
No finalized placement per DNA design system
No finalized copy (AI-draft awaiting Tim's steer)
reuse_why: The component already isolates the correct trigger seam and accessibility basics, but its scaffold positioning and draft copy must be rebuilt against the new design system.
decomposition_hints: Split the button presentation from the fixed-position layout shell so placement can be redesigned independently
Move finalized labels/copy into a content or config seam
Keep openTools as the stable boundary between the entry point and the palette surface
Consider merging this entry with the palette surface component once the redesign settles
